description: Phase Parent Documentation: when a spec folder has phase children, the parent only requires the lean trio (spec.md, description.json, graph-metadata.json). Heavier docs at the parent (plan.md, tasks.md, checklist.md, decision-record.md, implementation-summary.md) drift from child reality and cause AI hallucinations during resume. Continuity for phase parents lives in graph-metadata.json derived.last_active_child_id and is followed by /spec_kit:resume into the active child.
